en: How long have you been gone? Hard to know.
Get out there and save them.
Who's they? We started detecting gravitational anomalies almost 50 years ago.
ko: 우리는 거의 50년 전부터 중력 이상을 감지하기 시작했습니다.

en: Mostly small distortions to our instruments in the upper atmosphere.
ko: 주로 대기 상층에서 기기에서 작은 왜곡이 발생했어요.

en: In fact, I believe you encountered one yourself.
Yeah, over the straits. I crashed something, tripped my fly-by-wire.
But of all these anomalies, the most significant is this.
Out near Saturn. A disturbance of space-time.
It's a wormhole. It appeared 48 years ago.
